findings.message: No per-user rate limiting on AI endpoints — expensive AI calls could be abused.
Same missing rate limiting as generate endpoint.
InvalidUmlOutputError embeds up to 100 chars of raw AI response in message — safe today but fragile.

codex_review.summary: All HIGH issues resolved. SSRF blocklist covers RFC-1918, link-local, cloud metadata, 0.0.0.0, IPv6 loopback and ULA. 2 MEDIUM (no AI endpoint rate limiting), 1 LOW remain.
